_comment: The running example for this course is THE THING THE LEARNER WANTS TO BUILD. Capture it richly so every module can reason about it.
_comfort_level_scale: 1 = never heard of the BMAD Method, 5 = have used it; calibrates how deep the instructor goes
_navigation_preference_options: flexible = pick any module in any order (default for this buffet-style course); sequential = guided 1->9 path
